title: erodium cicutarium var. bipinnatum
intro: Erodium cicutarium var. bipinnatum, also known as redstem storksbill or red stem stork's bill, is a perennial herb belonging to the geranium family. The medicinal properties of this plant include its diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which are primarily attributed to its alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Erodium cicutarium var. bipinnatum include its ability to treat urinary issues, fever, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to prevent the formation of kidney stones. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, poultices, or topical creams for various health issues.
